---
title: ""
---

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="30%"}
![](profile.jpg){.rounded style="width:100%; border-radius: 50%;"}
:::

::: {.column width="5%"}
:::

::: {.column width="65%"}
## Christoph Bruegge

PhD Researcher
[Your Institution]
[Your Department]

I am a PhD researcher working on [brief description of your research]. My work focuses on [key themes].

[{{< fa envelope >}} c.bruegge\@icloud.com](mailto:c.bruegge@icloud.com)
[{{< fa brands github >}} clbruegge](https://github.com/clbruegge)

:::

::::
